sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n23218" key="dai+kth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δᾰϊκτ-ής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> foreg.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0085.tlg004.perseus-grc1:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope></bibl>, <sense id="n23218.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">φθόνος</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Anacreont.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">40.10</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (prob.).</sense> </entryFree>
